AddHousekeeper.selectAccommodationDesc: Choose the accommodation for which you wish to add this housekeeper to your team.
AddHousekeeper.housekeeperWillBeNotifiedDesc: She will then be able to accept your invitation to begin working on the selected accommodation.
AddHousekeeper.priceInvalid: Price per cleaning must be greater than 0.
AddHousekeeper.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Looking for a trustworthy person for regular cleaning
AddHousekeeper.requestSentDesc: When the application is accepted, the cleaning agent is automatically associated with the selected accommodation.
